description: C.R.A.F.T. Framework — gate implementation behind the Assemble approvals (PreToolUse), then auto-format and lint every file written during Forge (PostToolUse)

hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; npx prettier --write "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; npx eslint --fix "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true
